programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Way Back When! 1989
programme.desc: 60 minutes of lesser heard hits from 1989. Including Jimmy Somerville, Roy Orbison, Debbie Gibson, Halo James & Shakespear's Sister.

programme.title: Every Song From NOW 16 - 1989
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Every Song From NOW 16 - 1989
programme.desc: 16 was the very last 80s NOW released at the end of 1989 as a double CD, cassette, vinyl and even a VHS! Featuring Queen, Kate Bush, Tina Turner, Milli Vanilli & 31 others.

programme.title: Mark Goodier's US No.1s of 1989
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Mark Goodier's US No.1s of 1989
programme.desc: 60 minutes of back to back US chart toppers from 1989 - none of which made the top spot in the UK! Including Bad English, Michael Damian, Martika & New Kids On The Block.

programme.title: The NOW Yearbook 1989
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The NOW Yearbook 1989
programme.desc: Jenny Powell flicks through the pages of another Yearbook. 1989 saw the breakthrough of Italian house, the rise of Mad-chester and Stock, Aitken & Waterman in their imperial phase!

programme.title: Timmy Mallett's Brilliant Bands!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Timmy Mallett's Brilliant Bands!
programme.desc: Timmy's back with something a little different - a run through of his favourite 80s bands, many interviewed on his "Timmy On The Tranny" radio show throughout the decade!

programme.title: First Blast of Summer!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 First Blast of Summer!
programme.desc: The Heat Is On with the hottest tunes of the 80s! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the decade had to offer.

programme.title: Final Countdown! Footie Anthems
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Final Countdown! Footie Anthems
programme.desc: Get ready for the final round of Premier League with our pre-match warm up! The biggest & best terrace anthems - one from the 80s followed by the 90s. And Neil Diamond. Simple

programme.title: Top Gun 1986 v Maverick 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Top Gun 1986 v Maverick 2022
programme.desc: Soundtrack songs from the original of 1986 and the sequel from 2022. Including The Who, OneRepublic, Lady Gaga, Kenny Loggins, Harold Faltermeyer & Berlin.

programme.title: Every Video from Like A Prayer!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Every Video from Like A Prayer!
programme.desc: From Madonna's 1989 classic album, 6 of the 11 tracks had videos. And here they are - in order!

programme.title: It's 1989 Night!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 It's 1989 Night!
programme.desc: The year of Kylie, Jason, the huge dance smash by Black Box & we said hello to those New Kids On The Block. But let's not mention a certain dancing rabbit!

programme.title: Simon Bates Golden Hour: 1989
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Simon Bates Golden Hour: 1989
programme.desc: 60 minutes of hits & headlines from the year Sam Fox & Mick Fleetwood hosted the Brits, Baywatch launched on TV, and Stock Aitken & Waterman spend 16 weeks at number 1!

programme.title: Sade: Smooth Operators!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Sade: Smooth Operators!
programme.desc: A slow, luxurious glide through heartbreak & elegance, where nothing much happens. But by the end, you’re calmer, cooler & slightly convinced your life needs better lighting!

programme.title: NOW 100 Hits: Love Songs!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 NOW 100 Hits: Love Songs!
programme.desc: Simon Bates with the ultimate countdown of 80s love. Yes - 100 songs with heartfelt vocals, lush strings & big breakdowns in a 9 hour marathon! Expect Whitney, Lionel & George.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bank Holiday Love Songs
programme.desc: Classic love songs from the NOW 80s Music archive.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Witness a sold-out milestone at Shepherd’s Bush Theatre. Wishbone Ash marks 40 years with a career-spanning set of legends and new hits, plus special guests. It’s a high-energy celebration of guitar-driven rock history.

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Recorded live in Hamburg, this 2007 concert features a high-voltage mix of new material and legendary classics. Experience the enduring power of a hard rock institution with over 30 years of history on the stage.

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Discover how the Flying V revolutionized Rock and Metal. Featuring icons from Metallica, Megadeth, Slayer, and Judas Priest, this documentary explores the history and secrets behind the world’s most unique guitar and the legends who play it.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Venezuela's National Bread
programme.desc: Passionate cook Juan Pablo Gonzalez introduces us to the arepa, a Venezuelan specialty, and shows four different and delicious fillings.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Ajillo (Garlic)
programme.desc: Chef Luis "Tigretón" Leon cooks up three succulent dishes that are sure to please any garlic lover.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Baja Dishes
programme.desc: Chef Luis Valenzuela takes us on a culinary tour of the Baja region of Mexico with sweet and savoury flavours from the beach, to the mountains and back again.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Plantain Recipes
programme.desc: Plantain has a sweet reputation, but Venezuelan-born host Juan Pablo Gonzalez shows that banana's cousin also has a savoury side.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Spain's Specialty: Pork
programme.desc: Simple and sophisticated is the best way to describe Chef Luis "Tigretón" Leon's traditional Spanish recipes. He shows us why trout and ham is the new surf and turf.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Mexican Street Food
programme.desc: Master traditional Mexican tacos with Chef Luis Valenzuela who shares his secret to smoky and juicy pollo (chicken) tacos.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Traditional Venezuelan Recipes
programme.desc: Juan Pablo Gonzalez gives us a taste of Venezuelan home cooking with traditional recipes from a comforting, hearty squash soup to a sweet passion fruit custard.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Spanish Coastal Recipes
programme.desc: Spanish host Luis "Tigretón" Leon shares his take on four traditional dishes from the Basque region.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Chilies, Chilies, Chilies!
programme.desc: Bring the heat to your kitchen with Chef Luis Valenzuela as he shows us the diversity of chilies in four different recipes.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Dinner, Venezuelan Style
programme.desc: Host Juan Pablo Gonzalez shows us how to impress dinner guests with a mouth-watering Venezuelan four-course meal.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Seafood with a Spanish Twist
programme.desc: Chef Luis "Tigretón" Leon is an expert at paella and shows us the secret to perfecting this traditional Spanish dish.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Classic Mexican Dishes with Avocado
programme.desc: The avocado is a staple in Mexican cuisine and Chef Luis Valenzuela shows us how to whip up a creamy avocado salsa, the perfect side dish for crispy pork carnitas.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 South Korea + Spain
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne is always looking for the best food in the world to share. The first stop is South Korea with her Sesame Crusted Tuna 'Yukhoe', a delicious blend of favourite Korean flavours. Next stamp on the passport? Spain! Mouth-watering Duck Breast is seared and served rare with a crispy artichoke heart, membrillo, olives, and sweet-savoury sherry reduction. Beef short ribs are the common ingredient with Catalonian Braised and Romesco to one side and sticky Korean Kalbi-style grilled to the east! For the topper, drool over Bulgogi Octopus simmered and served with saffron-scented Sticky Rice Paella cakes, finished with crispy Paprika-Gochujang battered mussel....

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Venezuelan Corn Recipes
programme.desc: Venezuelan-born Juan Pablo Gonzalez shows the versatility of corn and prepares sweet and savoury dishes with this traditional ingredient.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Spanish Tapas
programme.desc: Late dinner with friends? Tapas will tide you over and Spanish-born C Chef Luis “Tigretón” Leon shows us four traditional mouth-watering dishes.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Traditional Mexican beans with breakfast, lunch and dinner
programme.desc: Chef Luis Valenzuela fries up classic Mexican bean recipes, proving that the side dish can also be the main attraction.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Venezuela's National Bread
programme.desc: Passionate cook Juan Pablo Gonzalez introduces us to the arepa, a Venezuelan specialty, and shows four different and delicious fillings.

programme.desc: The avocado is a staple in Mexican cuisine and Chef Luis Valenzuela shows us how to whip up a creamy avocado salsa, the perfect side dish for crispy pork carnitas.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 South Korea + Spain
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne is always looking for the best food in the world to share. The first stop is South Korea with her Sesame Crusted Tuna 'Yukhoe', a delicious blend of favourite Korean flavours. Next stamp on the passport? Spain! Mouth-watering Duck Breast is seared and served rare with a crispy artichoke heart, membrillo, olives, and sweet-savoury sherry reduction. Beef short ribs are the common ingredient with Catalonian Braised and Romesco to one side and sticky Korean Kalbi-style grilled to the east! For the topper, drool over Bulgogi Octopus simmered and served with saffron-scented Sticky Rice Paella cakes, finished with crispy Paprika-Gochujang battered mussel....

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Hong Kong Foodie Favourites
programme.desc: Cantonese expert Mary Tang showcases traditional dishes from the Chinese coastal territory, Hong Kong. To kick off the episode, Mary rolls up and steams a batch of fluffy Shrimp Dumplings. Next, tender beef with chewy rice noodles and fermented black beans is on the menu. This dish is doused in a fun and tasty dressing featuring salty soy sauce, tart Shaoxing wine, sweet oyster sauce, and a medley of spices. With a sturdy clay pot, Mary then cooks up some savoury Chinese sausage and lays it on a bed of aromatic rice. To top it off, why not some delicious Pineapple Buns? These buns are pillowy and sweet; you'll be surprised to hear that they contain zero pineapple!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E11 Hanoi Specialties
programme.desc: Simple, fun, and magically tasty, some of Vietnam's most delicious and well-known foods come from its capital city of Hanoi. Vietnamese expert Lisa Nguyen shares her knowledge of Hanoi dishes by starting off with a sweet, sour, and spicy papaya salad called Goi Du Du. With a popular nuoc cham dressing featuring sugar, lime juice and Thai chili drizzled over a medley of crunchy carrots, fresh cilantro and mint, chewy papaya, and shrimp, this dish is the perfect balance of wonderful flavours and textures. Also on the menu, grilled-to-perfection Pork Patties with a rich caramel sauce. Fresh fragrant dill and golden turmeric elevate Lisa's next dish as she cooks up some mahi-mahi to enjoy...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E18 Nuts about Walnuts, Pine Nuts and Pistachios
programme.desc: Nuts are a staple in Lebanon - they add depth of flavour and make dishes more hearty. Talented home cook Jasmin Ibrahim shows us a unique Lebanese dish that is traditionally made in the dead of winter - Winter Tabbouleh. With no fresh herbs or vegetables, this crunchy nut, feta, and tasty bulgur salad will get you through a long winter night. Next, she makes a simmering beef tortellini with toasted pine nuts in a hot, tangy yoghurt sauce. She then cooks up tender Celebration Lamb showered in three kinds of tasty nuts; it's great for sharing at special occasions. To finish off, Jasmin prepares some delicious walnut-filled Lebanese Pancakes doused in sweet rose water - yum! Ditch the...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E25 From the Island of Crete
programme.desc: Greek expert Joanna Chery showcases unique recipes from the island of Crete. To start, she whips up a creamy Cretan Meat Pie. Sweet ricotta, tender lamb, and an aromatic bundle of spices covered in a flaky Greek yoghurt pie dough might be the best Greek comfort food. Next, Joanna makes Grouper with Okra - a light and healthy dish featuring flaky sea bass, fresh okra, and delicious potatoes. Then, she prepares a dish that's traditionally served at weddings - Gamopilafo. It's a fluffy, citrusy, rice pilaf topped with crispy, juicy chicken that will have you going back for seconds! For dessert, a popular Cretan treat called Baklava. Joanna expertly layers crispy, golden-brown phyllo pastry...

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Pizza Take-Out
programme.desc: Who doesn't love pizza night? Host Spencer Watts whips up a Quick and Easy Duo Pizza with a fresh Tomato Basil Salad.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Thai Take-Out
programme.desc: Toss out the take-out menu! In just 30 minutes, host Spencer Watts shows us how to cook a mouth-watering Thai take-out dinner for four.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Japanese Take-Out
programme.desc: Instead of going out for dinner, Spencer Watts cooks up a Japanese Take-out feast for four in around 30 minutes, for around 30 dollars.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Vietnamese Take-Out
programme.desc: Vietnamese take-out in just 30 minutes? It's possible! Join chef Spencer Watts in his kitchen as he makes a Vietnamese meal for four that costs around 30 dollars.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Equestrian School
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill Team get in the saddle and get inspired to grill up some BBQ! With a full school of riders to feed they grill up some Wild West plates. The menu: Texas Rockets, Perfect Beef Jerky, Beef Brisket, and Hearty Beet & fennel Salad.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Soap Box Derby
programme.desc: Not only do the racers in the Soap Box Derby have a need for speed, they have a need for BBQ! Matt and the RG team cook up a feast to slow down any speedster. The menu: Smoked Shrimp B.L.T., Pineapple Basil Rotisserie Chicken, Grilled Sweet Potato Pops, and Summer Berry Pudding.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Day By the Water
programme.desc: Matt spends the day by the water; fishing, playing Frisbee, catching some rays. What goes with water and sun? BBQ!!! Matt & his team make a seafood buffet of Grilled Clams in the Shell with Serrano Ham, Smoked Lake Rainbow Trout, Grilled Lobster with Grapefruit Salsa, and Crab-Stuffed Avocados.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Volleyball Tournament
programme.desc: Matt gets down and dirty playing some beach Volleyball. In between bumps, sets, and spikes, the RG team serves up a smorgasbord of great food. The menu: Grilled Chicken Breast on Foccacia with Grilled Apples & Cambozola Cheese, Sezchuan Ribs with Chunky Plum Dipping Sauce, Roasted Corn and Pepper Potato Salad, and Homemade Protein Bars

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Fun with Woks
programme.desc: Host Mary Tang shows us some easy Chinese take-out dishes that are a true "wok" in the park! First, she rolls up some juicy wontons to douse in a bowl of hot seasoned chicken broth and delicious bok choy for a Chinese classic - Wonton Soup. Next, she gets out her frying pan for a crispy bowl of flavourful Chicken Chow Mein with egg noodles, savoury browned chicken, crunchy snow peas, and tasty baby corn. For an even simpler dish (and fan favourite), she then cooks up a hearty dish of Beef and Broccoli. Finally, Mary plays on different flavours with her Sweet and Sour Pork. Marinated pork cubes fried in a wonderful wok with fragrant garlic and ginger, sweet and tart red and green peppers,...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E12 Vietnam's Love for Noodles
programme.desc: Noodles are a staple in Vietnamese cooking and host Lisa Nguyen showcases their versatility by starting off with fine vermicelli Stuffed Squid. Beautifully grilled and charred, these squid make great finger food. Lisa sticks to stuffing with her next dish - a Vietnamese favourite, Spring Rolls. Crunchy on the outside and filled with soft glass noodles, juicy ground pork, tender shrimp, and delectable crab meat on the inside, you're sure to be salivating at the sight of these tasty creations. Next on the menu, a Crispy Egg Noodle Pillow with a medley of vegetables and sauces on top. Lisa then finishes with a fun seafood and tomato soup; make sure you try the yummy shrimp and delightful...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E19 Four Course Lebanese
programme.desc: Host Jasmin Ibrahim gives us the lowdown on her four favourite Lebanese dishes for a tasty meal. The best part? They all incorporate sweet and crunchy pomegranate! First, she makes a smoked eggplant dish - Baba Ghanouj. Then, she prepares a delicious Pastry with Pomegranate Sauce. These little half-moons, are filled with rich lamb, fresh mint, and toasted pine nuts, then paired with citrusy pomegranate molasses for a true balance of flavours. Next on the menu, Chicken with Pomegranate Sauce - a delightful blend of aromatic spices, sweet pomegranate molasses, and tender chicken breast. Enjoy with some fluffy rice and roasted vegetables for a delectable Sunday night dinner. Finally, Jasmin...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E26 OPA!
programme.desc: Host Joanna Chery elevates four Greek dishes using wine and spirits in this episode of One World Kitchen. First up, brown rice Stuffed Mussels infused with Greek dry white wine, tangy lemon juice, and fragrant spices - perfect for a sunny day by the sea. When evening rolls around, Joanna insists that red wine is a must! She makes a Sausage and Pepper Stew packed with golden-brown sausages and colourful bell peppers simmered in yummy tomatoes and a healthy dose of red wine. Then, she pulls out some brandy for a tender and delicious Beef Orzo Casserole. Finally, Joanna uses a traditional licorice-flavoured spirit called ouzo to bake a mouth-watering batch of Drunk Cookies.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Food Truck Take-Out
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts takes just 30 minutes to make classic food truck fare, without breaking the bank.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Southern Barbeque Night
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts cooks up a Southern-style feast for the whole family including Crunchy Coleslaw and Oven Barbeque Chicken all in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Greek Night
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts cooks up a delicious Greek feast in around 30 minutes, for under 30 dollars.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Gourmet Soup and Sammies
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts prepares a quick and easy meal including Rustic Tuna Melts and Skillet S'mores, all under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Big Bike Fundraiser
programme.desc: Forget bicycle built for two. This Big Bike fits 30 people! Matt & the team join forces with the Heart & Stroke foundation to raise money by riding around a track. Matt feeds these 'bikers' some healthy and delicious grub. The menu: Grilled Calamari, Smoked Turkey Fajitas, Grilled Scallops and Watermelon Salsa, and Cold Gazpacho.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Air Show
programme.desc: It's a bird, it's a plane, it's a day of great BBQ. Inspired by the aerial acrobatics of CF18's and Harvards, Matt cooks up a variety of poultry and fowl. The menu: Bacon Wrapped Quail Stuffed with 3 Cream Cheeses, Raspberry Chipotle Turkey Wings, Grilled Balsamic Marinated Duck Breast, and Deviled Eggs.

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Tart, Tuna, Carbonara, and Claufoutis
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford unveils four spellbinding dishes! First up, a mushroom-brie tart! Next, tuna with grilled fennel-kale! Followed by classic spaghetti Carbonara! Finishing with a berry clafoutis!

programme.title: Spice Secrets
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Seeds, Bark + Flower Parts
programme.desc: In this tasty episode of Spice Secrets, Jasmin and Shahir are back to spicing things up with everything from seed to bark to flower part! First up? A yummy French classic, the Croque Madame, gets a new twist with an aromatic Cinnamon Bechamel. Next, Potato Gnocchi gets some pep from poppy seeds, served in rich creamy sauce that's infused with aureate strands of sultry saffron. For a sweet finish, dessert finds an unusual friend in dill seed! A surprise pairing that works well thanks to science!

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Saturday Morning Breakfast
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern shows us how to make delightful breakfast treats like banana bread and hand pies filled with grape jelly.

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Coq au Vin
programme.desc: Up the Dish goes French cuisine with Poppy Sandler's classic Coq au Vin! Slow-cooked chicken in a luscious red wine sauce with pearl onions and mushrooms on the side? Yes please! Tiera Singh sticks with the tricolour theme and makes a Salad Lyonnaise - crispy bacon, poached eggs, and homemade croutons, with a red wine-bacon vinaigrette that steals the show. Missy Hui stays on the continent but skips la Republique; her Vincotto Mushrooms with Lentils uses an Italian wine to sauce up meaty oyster mushrooms and aromatic vegetables for a vegetarian twist. But Micah Trainor takes us right back to France - her Rabbit Rillettes with Champagne Gelee is white tablecloth worthy, with rabbit confit...

programme.title: One BIG Recipe
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Upside Down
programme.desc: Last things are first for this 'Upside Down' themed One Big Recipe featuring Montreal chef Kimberly Lallouz. Fruit and cheese to start? Why not? Check out her dessert wine poached Grilled Pears and Blue Cheese Salad. Next, Beef Tartare Sliders are spiked with horseradish aioli and served on warm brioche. Pasta follows, but in keeping with her topsy turvy theme, Korean flavour meets Italian savour in her Kimchi Pappardelle. programme.desc: On the Dine Your Sign Spring Special, Chef Siobhan Detkavich is cooking for Aries, Taurus, and Gemini! First, quiche with the season’s most delicious gifts – tender asparagus and earthy morels – suspended in silky custard and smothered in creamy fontina cheese! Next, spring lamb is stuffed with a sprightly pesto of mint and dandelion greens and roasted with shallots and new potatoes. Then, it’s an easy, healthy halibut dish with ramps (aka ‘wild garlic’) and grassy fiddleheads – the fish is steamed and finished with a sizzling pour over oil treatment that leaves the kitchen smelling like heaven! Finally, dessert a spring sign is sure to love: buttery, flaky croissant, stuffed with rich...

The next dish continues the theme of duality: Corn Two Ways! A creamy corn puree and a fried corn fritter! Next, a pizza for when you can't make up your mind. Half classic margherita, half gorgonzola, duck confit and pear. Finally, Geminis like chef Siobhan like to turn things on their heads, like her dessert of a Pineapple Upside-Down Cake!

Delving into the secrets of the Uros, she unveils their timeless artistry in building floating islands, a testament to human resilience. But as she travels to Amantani Island, an enigma awaits—a forgotten temple, rituals that date back to the pre-Incan times, chapters of Peru’s lesser-explored history waiting to unfold.

Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels

programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 10 Days Scotland Edinburgh (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bulgaria Plovdiv
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Backpack Belgrade, Serbia
programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 10 Days Scotland Perth (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Backpack Novi Sad, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Boarding Pass Santa Village, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bulgaria Sunny Beach
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 City Breaks Ahmedabad (ENG)
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Food Fact Fun The Hague, Netherlands
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeen (ENG)
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Backpack Pozarevac, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Boarding Pass Rovaniemi, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bulgaria Sofia
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 1(Eng)
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Food Fact Fun Rotterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeenshire (ENG)
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Backpack Majdanpek, Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Boarding Pass Levi, Finland
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bhutan Paro
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 2(Eng)
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Food Fact Fun Utrecht, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 10 Days Scotland Inverness (ENG)
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Backpack Nis, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Boarding Pass Ruka Kuusamo, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bhutan Thimpu
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 World Heritage Ancient Temples of Egypt, Egypt (ENG)
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Food Fact Fun Gouda, Netherlands
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 10 Days Scotland Isle Of Skye (ENG)
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Backpack Resavsk Pecina, Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 With Love From Mauritius Ep 1
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bhutan Phobjikha
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 World Spas Kempenki, Jordan (ENG)
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Food Fact Fun Dubai 1
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The Volkswagon Golf becomes one of the most successful cars in history.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Be it the 24 Hours of Le Mans, the Monte Carlo Rally or Formula 1, Porsche won it all at least once; even the first prototype was a race winner, and the successes of the Spyder in the Carrera Panamericana or the Targa Florio are unforgettable.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Track Masters
programme.desc: An angry bull, a few Englishmen who prepared themselves for unpleasant weather conditions and a young, talented race driver -- all venture to the infamous Green Hell of the Nürburgring.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Track Masters
programme.desc: A tuned-up Golf 2, a family sedan from Hannover, Germany and a very special Porsche GT2.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Track Masters
programme.desc: The Nürburgring has transformed into a winter wonderland. Although it looks pretty, it is not pretty to use as a racetrack.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Track Masters
programme.desc: Fog, rain and snow means that a visit to the Eifel region isn't that pleasant.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Bentley and the Rolls Royce.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Supercars presents three cars with a combined output of 1779 HP: McLaren MP4-12, Mercedes SLS AMG GT, and Porsche 911 Turbo S. There's hardly any car that can match their performance, elegance or workmanship.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Supercars takes a look behind the scenes of the final race of the 2013 Blancpain Endurance Series.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: An iconic racing car and one of only 29 ever built, the Mercedes 300 SL lightweight makes its premiere drive at the Mille Miglia.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Motorheads
programme.desc: Portrait of Ferruccio Lamborghini, who originally built tractors, but then moved on to found one of the most famous sports car factories in the world.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Motorheads
programme.desc: Ferdinand Anton Ernst Porsche was a pioneer of the car business and created an icon among automobiles, the Porsche 356.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Motorheads
programme.desc: Henry Ford was an automotive pioneer, a man who wanted to improve the world in which we live.

programme.title: Ferrari Challenge UK
programme.desc: Each round comprised two races for the Ferrari Challenge Trofeo Pirelli UK championship.

programme.title: Ignition GT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E119 Ignition GT
programme.desc: The Lexus RX350, Porsche Cayenne Coupé; Getting up close and personal with an armored Ford Ranger.

programme.title: Buyer's Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E1116 Buyer's Guide
programme.desc: Richard and Sagie help a new mum pick the right automatic family car, decide if a high-mileage BMW X1 is still a smart buy, and probe a Jetta 6 TSI that keeps cutting power.

programme.title: IGNITION Goes to SEMA
programme.sub-title: S01 : E101 IGNITION Goes to SEMA
programme.desc: Join Vic Pardal as he takes you on a tour of the greatest automotive trade show in the world. From innovative products to custom vehicles, SEMA has something for every motorhead.

programme.title: Mercedes Targa Florio Racing Car from 1924 Back on the Road
programme.desc: A Mercedes 2-litre racing car from 1924 triumphs at the Targa Florio endurance race. Mercedes-Benz Classic restores this iconic vehicle and plans to showcase it at various events in 2024 and celebrate 100 years since its victory.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: More power and yet better fuel economy? This is supposed to be possible with chip tuning; in order to explore this, we sent two teams on a road trip from South Germany to Barcelona, Spain, and back, a total distance of 3,000 kilometres.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: A new car; a new driving experience; a new lifestyle; but what paths do the four wheels, the engine and the car's body need to take until the first drive?

programme.title: The Car of the Future
programme.desc: The car of the future may look aerodynamic and almost no fuel consumption.

programme.title: Vintage Airplane Show Days
programme.desc: A look at one of the oldest airfields in Germany and motorized aviation.

programme.title: 90 Years BMW Motorrad
programme.desc: After nine decades of eventful history BMW Motor Bikes are seen today.

programme.title: Iceland Off-Road Action
programme.desc: Rough nature, unreal landscapes, unpredictable weather, but also a paradise for lovers of all-wheel vehicles: Iceland is Europe's off-roading Mecca.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: Whether it is the Porsche 911 Cabriolet, the Audi R8 Spyder, or the Mercedes SLS AMG Roadster, German convertibles enjoy a world-wide reputation.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: Whether it is the Jaguar F-Type, the Aston Martin V8 Vantage or the Bentley Continental, English convertibles are elegant and exclusive.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: Open sportscars from Ferrari, Alfa Romeo, Maserati, and Lamborghini are stunning.

programme.title: DreamCars

programme.title: Simple Session 2025 - BMX Finals WOMEN
programme.desc: Simple Session is back at Unibet Arena in Tallinn, Estonia – celebrating its massive 25-year anniversary! A quarter-century of mind-blowing BMX riding and skateboarding, unforgettable moments, and a global community of athletes pushing the limits.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2017
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Snow Bike Festival 2017 - Gstaad (SUI)
programme.desc: The Snow Bike Festival is Europe’s “Winter Festival of Snow Biking”. The third edition of the innovative snow-bike event will take place at Gstaad, Switzerland, from January 19 to 22, 2017.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2017
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 GlemmRide 2017 - Mountainbike Slopestyle (AUT)
programme.desc: After the successful premiere in 2015, the date for the 3nd GlemmRide Bike Festival has been fixed: From 6th-9th July 2017 the bike mecca of Saalbach Hinterglemm will host a truly sporty & party filled weekend.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 E-Tour du Mont-Blanc 2021
programme.desc: The route of the MTB multi-stage event Tour du Mont Blanc (E-TMB) leads around Europe's highest mountain - a breathtaking Alpine backdrop. 12,000 meters ascent and 16,000 meters descent over a distance of 300 km.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Snow Bike Festival 2018 - Gstaad (SUI)
programme.desc: The Snow Bike Festival is Europe’s “Winter Festival of Snow Biking”. The fourth edition of the innovative snow-bike event will take place at Gstaad, Switzerland, from January 18 to 21, 2018.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Kayaking Kerala - Part 2
programme.desc: An international team of kayaking world champions and experienced expeditionists have set out to conquer the wild waters of Kerala. Hardly any other region in the world offers such a variety of rapids and waterfalls.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Nyami Nyami - Slacklining at the Victoria Falls
programme.desc: Two renowned highlining athletes, Reinhard Kleindl (AUT) and Lukas Irmler (GER), realized one of the longest highlines in Africa and the southern hemisphere at the world-famous Victoria Falls!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 Outdoorsportsteam Paragliding - The Dream of Flight
programme.desc: We take you into the sky and accompany a paragliding virtuoso to the Mont Blanc massif, the Atacama Desert in Chile and the Greek island of Santorini. Follow French paraglider pilot Jean-Baptiste Chandelier.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 Dani Arnold - Ice Climbing at Lake Baikal
programme.desc: Swiss extreme sportsman Dani Arnold went on a challenging expedition to the deepest lake on earth - Lake Baikal. The Siberian winter provided accordingly difficult and fascinating conditions.

programme.title: Vendée Globe 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Vendée Globe - Episode 9
programme.desc: The Vendée Globe aims to use the media impact of the event to raise public awareness of ocean conservation throughout the round-the-world race. They are direct witnesses to the changes underway, particularly around Antarctica, a region that is under particular threat.

programme.title: Vendée Globe 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Vendée Globe - Episode 10
programme.desc: The Vendée Globe aims to use the media impact of the event to raise public awareness of ocean conservation throughout the round-the-world race. They are direct witnesses to the changes underway, particularly around Antarctica, a region that is under particular threat.

programme.title: Vendée Globe 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Vendée Globe - Episode 11
programme.desc: The Vendée Globe aims to use the media impact of the event to raise public awareness of ocean conservation throughout the round-the-world race. They are direct witnesses to the changes underway, particularly around Antarctica, a region that is under particular threat.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 GlemmRide Bike Festival - Saalbach-Hinterglemm (AUT)
programme.desc: Saalbach Hinterglemm: The GlemmRide Bike Festival will take place again from July 12th to 15th, 2018. International stars from the world of mountain biking meet at the top-class FMB Gold Slopestyle and show off their best tricks on the unique route

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Snow Bike Festival 2019 - Gstaad (SUI)
programme.desc: The Snow Bike Festival 2019 is THE event of the young snow bike boom and brings together like-minded athletes from all over the world. With the extra wide and grippy wheels you are ready for your exciting ride in the snow.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Attakwas Extreme - MTB - Attakwaskloof (RSA)
programme.desc: Sout Africa´s toughest one-day-mountainbike stage race

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 GlemmRide 2019 - MTB Slopestyle - Saalbach Hinterglemm (AUT)
programme.desc: For the fifth time in a row, Saalbach Hinterglemm is inviting you to a festive bike meeting: the GlemmRide Bike Festival will once again take place in the bike Eldorado. International stars of the mountain bike scene come together and show breathtaking tricks.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E41 WOF 2024 #41: Queen & King of the Court - Utrecht (NED)
programme.desc: From September 5th to 8th, 2024, Queen & King of the Court returns to Utrecht at the Jaarbeursplein! This renewed edition is dedicated to “The Ultimate Mashup” and promises to be an amazing experience for athletes and fans.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 WOF 2024 #43: World Downhill Skateboarding Championship 2024 #2
programme.desc: Get ready for an adrenaline-packed ride at the Brinx World Downhill Skateboarding Championship 2024 in the stunning landscapes of Wales! Join us as we dive into the action, witness intense competition, and celebrate the heart-pounding thrills of downhill skateboarding!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 WOF 2024 #10: Reconnect Two - USA
programme.desc: Today we continue our North American Odyssey with Sarka Pancochova and Cheryl Maas in Reconnect Two. From Mt Baker and the legendary Bank Slalom to backcountry kickers in Bend get ready for the full Pacific Northwest snowboard experience.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 WOF 2024 #18: If it’s easy it’s not fun
programme.desc: Join us on a beatiful adventures through the sky and desert of Jordan, where three french friends seek for adrenalin and creacks in the sandstone of Wadirum (JOR).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 WOF 2024 #19: Pasko the Magic Move
programme.desc: Recovering from testicular cancer, professional athlete and filmmaker Maarten Molenaar embarks on a journey to Fuerteventura to learn a new freestyle windsurfing trick - the Pasko.

programme.title: LINE OF SIGHT | A Look into Wingsuit BASE Jumping
programme.desc: The golden age of wingsuiting is upon us. Through evolving suit technology the initial inflation time has gone down, which has lead to quicker starts and more exits. Wingsuit athletes Marshal Miller, Jesse Hall, and Sean Chuma take you through the iconic jumps.

programme.title: GKA Hydrofoil Big Air World Cup Abu Dhabi 2025- 26min-HL

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E01 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: The spectacular Fefor Arena hosted for the 8th time the Worlds Strongest Viking, part of the SCL World Series. But with the absence of former title holders its anyones game. Again, a very spectacular episode of the Strongman Champions League here in Norway.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E02 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 2, Finland (Part 1)
programme.desc: In this episode, the Titan, former double World champion from Latvia will compete against his fellow countryman and the current World champion - Aivars Smaukstelis. With 8 events over 2 stages the contestants are pushed to their limits in Finland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E03 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 3, Finland (Part 2)
programme.desc: Dainis Zageris and Aivars Smaukstelis, both from Latvia have a serious, strong battle in the this second and final episode of the SCL Finland 2020. Watch the unbelievable and brute power of these athletes in the last 4 events to crown the winner.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E04 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 4, World Record Breakers
programme.desc: The SCL Germany event takes place in an ancient castle called Die Burg in the heart of Germany. Its here where 5 world record attempts take place across 5 different events with 10 athletes. They will go to the max! See this and much more in the SCL Germany 2020.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E05 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 5, Strongest Viking
programme.desc: SCL Norway is normally all about snow, wind, and cold weather. Our brave athletes are used to compete under conditions few other athletes have competed in, but after COVID delays the competition has been moved from winter to summer bringing in a whole new range of challenges. With an impressive athlete list who will be the winner across 5 cruel events?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E06 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 6, World Strongest Team 1
programme.desc: Were in sunny Finland for the next stage of a double-bill of SCL action, but this time its a team event. A truly fantastic event with 6000 spectators. Even during COVID times this was exceptional! 8 Strong Teams where fighting for the title over a crazy 9 events.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E07 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 7, World Strongest Team 2
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland, done over 9 cruel events. In this episode the last and final 5 events take place. 8 Strong Teams are fighting for the title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E08 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 8, Portugal
programme.desc: The next set of challenges are set in sunny Esposende in Portugal. With stars such as Travis Ortmayer, Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland, and Ervin Toots from Estonia. While Fabio Silva will defend the honour in his own country.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E09 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 9, World Records (Part 1)
programme.desc: We are back in Germany, with the world record breakers. We promise you this is going to be amazing. Do not move from that seat, because we are going to see some records smashed today. Over 6 cruel events, you will see who gets crowned of the King Of The Castle!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E10 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 10, World Records (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the next episode of Strongman Champions League Germany. Its the world record breakers, and in the last show we set two new records. Can more be records be broken before the king of the castle is crowned?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E11 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 11, Worlds 105 Kg (Part 1)
programme.desc: Welcome to Kokkola in Finland. This city will be the setting for the Lightweight World championship. Out of 24 athletes, only 16 will make it through to the final day, but who will champion each event and who is going to be eliminated?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E08 Stage 8 - ESTONIA - 2024
programme.desc: For the first time in over 10 years back in Estonia, in Tartu. 12 of the Strongest athletes in the world will fight here for the title and the overall world championship points. You will see 5 crazy events, such as: Boat Pull, Viking Press, Medley, Conan's Wheel and a very heavy Power Stairs!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E12 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 12, Worlds 105 Kg (Part 2)
programme.desc: Its the second day, and the top 16 athletes have made it through to the final round. With another 4 events to go who will get the crown of world champion?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E13 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 13, Ukraine
programme.desc: Welcome to Ukraine and the wonderful capital city of Kyiv. Were here for the second time for the iconic truck pull World Championships! The reigning World champion Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland will defend his title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E14 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 14, Romania
programme.desc: In this episode, a final chance for our athletes to get vital world series ranking points on board to give them the best possible chance of success and an initial advantage at the finals. It's the last show before the world finals and the top 10 places are up for grabs, but who will they be?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E15 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 15, World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E16 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 16, World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E01 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 1, Finland Stage 1
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We’re here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you’re in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E02 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 2, Holland Part 1
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they’re going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they’re all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let’s see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E03 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 3, Holland Part 2
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We’ve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan’s Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E04 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 4, Serbia Part 1
programme.desc: We’re in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E05 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 5, Serbia Part 2
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We’ve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E06 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 6, Joensuu Part 1
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They’re going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other’s strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E07 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 7, Joensuu Part 2
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world’s strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E08 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 8, Esposende
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E09 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 9, Great Britain
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E10 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 10, Poland Part 1
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E11 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 11, Poland Part 2
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland, after 3 events the Polish Strongman Oskar Ziolkowski is Leading. Kelvin, Travis and Aivars are coming up and will try to beat him, but will Oskar take his first title ever?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E12 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 12, Bosnia
programme.desc: it’s been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let’s see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E13 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 13, Romania
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It’s an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. There’s only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, there’s going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E14 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 14, Gibraltar
programme.desc: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E15 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 15, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkey’s south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season of Strongman Champions League. Here in the sunshine, we’ll finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is. You could not ask for a better setting. After months of hard-work, if not years for some of these lads, we find out who will take the world title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E16 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 16, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. It’s all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E01 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 1 - Finland
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2023 Strongman Champions League in Vaasa, Finland! This year’s event introduces a knockout format with 6 intense events over 90 minutes, ending in a unique deadlift face-off with boats.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E02 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 2 - Serbia
programme.desc: Stage 2 of the Strongman Champions League 2023 is set in Zrenjanin, Serbia. This exciting event features 5 challenging contests, including a superhuman Yoke race. As the SCL World Series Tour continues, athletes will battle it out to claim the yellow leader’s position for the season. Don’t miss this incredible stage of strength and endurance!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E03 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World
programme.desc: The World’s Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we’ve picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they’ll be going all out against each other. It’s now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let’s start the action.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E09 Stage 9 - PORTUGAL - 2024
programme.desc: We have returned to Portugal, at the beach of Eposende, to bring you EUROPE'S STRONGEST LATINO. In the beautiful sun of Portugal five cruel events are done in this heat: Truck Pull, Deadlift, Log Lift, Sandbag Toss, Medley.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 4 - Holland
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it’s the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E05 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 5 - Holland 2023
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it’s about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E06 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World’s Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E07 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E08 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 8 - Portugal
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn’t compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts; it’s the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E09 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 9 - England
programme.desc: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it’s going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don’t, this is strongman champions league.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E10 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking
programme.desc: On the menu this week it’s medieval madness, we’ve come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world’s strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E11 Stage 11 - SCL Poland 2023
programme.desc: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it’s explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I’m shaking because it’s Poland, it’s powerful, it’s strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it’s about to get heavy.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E12 Stage 12 - SCL Poland 2023
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E13 Stage 13 - SCL Cyprus 2023
programme.desc: It’s time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E14 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 14 - South Africa
programme.desc: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E15 Stage 15 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E16 Stage 16 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E03 GLORY 107 Rotterdam
programme.desc: GLORY welterweight world champion Chico Kwasi (45-6-2, 23 KO) will step up in weight to challenge GLORY middleweight world champion Donovan Wisse (23-1, 10 KO) in the main event of GLORY 107. In the co-main event, giants Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (30-5-1, 17 KO) and Nico ‘Big Sexy’ Horta (26-11, 4 KO) will square off in a highly anticipated rematch.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E09 GLORY 89 Bulgaria
programme.desc: Badr Hari will go head-to-head with Estonia’s Uku Jürjendal in a GLORY Grand Prix Qualifier. Middleweight Champ Petchpanomrung will defend his belt against newcomer David Meija. Bulgarias own, Stoyan Koprivlenski, will face off with Romanian Sorin Caliniuc. Also fighting is Heavyweight Levi Rigters and Luis Tavares makes his return.

programme.sub-title: S00 : E08 GLORY 88 Paris
programme.desc: A huge title fight rematch will take place in the main event as rivals Tiffany ‘Time Bomb’ van Soest (24-6-2, 9 KO) and Sarah Moussaddak (8-3, 1 KO) lock horns once again. The rest of the card is stacked with some exciting names and thrilling fights. French Algerian Nordine Mahieddine (27-15, 12 KO) collides with France’s Abderahmane Coulibaly (58-20-1, 25 KO) in a big heavyweight contest, Germany’s Denis Wosik (37-8-1, 9 KO) meets the super popular Albanian Berjan Peposhi (27-3, 16 KO), former GLORY title challenger Karim Ghajji (103-17-1, 53 KO) returns and squares-off against Serbia’s Nikola Todorovic (26-3, 14 KO), and Iliass Hammouche (32-6, 7 KO) will finally make his much...

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E07 GLORY 87 Rotterdam
programme.desc: A four-man one-night heavyweight tournament will take centre stage with the winner punching his ticket into the historic end of year GLORY Heavyweight Grand Prix for a chance to win a life-changing $500,000. The four participants are Dutch giant Martin Terpstra (21-5, 11 KO), former light heavyweight title contender Mohamed Amine (29-5, 16 KO), the explosive Bahram Rajabzadeh (62-1, 56 KO), and the bruising power puncher Uku Jürjendal (18-7, 14 KO). A huge international title fight will feature in the co-main event as Tyjani Beztati (24-4, 9 KO) will put his GLORY lightweight championship on the line against Japanese star Kaito Ono (51-6-1, 22 KO).
